title: Tony Elumelu Foundation Agribusiness Grant
description: Seed capital and mentorship for African entrepreneurs in agribusiness and agri-tech.

title: AGRA Youth in Agribusiness Award
description: Annual award celebrating innovative youth-led agribusiness ventures across Africa.

title: Kenya Youth Agripreneur Accelerator
description: 6-month accelerator programme for youth-led agribusinesses in Kenya, offering mentorship and market linkages.

title: Ghana Cocoa Board Youth Cooperative Fund
description: Supporting youth cooperatives in cocoa farming and processing in Ghana.

title: Ethiopia Agricultural Transformation Agency Grant
description: Funding for youth-led agri-tech and input supply businesses in Ethiopia.

title: Tanzania Youth Agribusiness Challenge
description: Annual business plan competition for youth entrepreneurs in Tanzania's agriculture sector.

title: Uganda Development Bank Agri-Youth Loan
description: Concessional loans for youth agripreneurs aged 18–35 in Uganda at 12% interest rate.

title: Rwanda Agriculture Board Youth Innovation Fund
description: Supporting innovative agricultural technologies developed by Rwandan youth.

title: Africa Food Prize — Young Champions
description: Recognising transformative African-led work in agriculture. Youth track for entrepreneurs under 35.

title: IFAD Youth Agripreneur Fellowship
description: 12-month fellowship connecting young African agripreneurs with global markets and investors.

title: Nigerian Youth Investment Fund — Agric Window
description: Federal government initiative providing zero-interest loans to Nigerian youth in agriculture.

title: East Africa Agri-Fintech Pitch Competition
description: Pitch competition for startups at the intersection of financial technology and agriculture across East Africa.
